questionHtml: Outline why the observer detects a series of increases and decreases in the intensity of the received signal as the boat moves along the line XY.
markschemeHtml:
interference pattern is observed

OR

interference/superposition mentioned ✔


maximum when two waves occur in phase/path difference is nλ

OR

minimum when two waves occur 180° out of phase/path difference is (n + ½)λ ✔

meta.title: Outline why the observer detects a series of increases and decreases in the intensity of the received signal as the boat moves along the line XY.
